body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: Organ wrapper that surfaces the capsule under the standard organ contract: bounded fixture cases, two planted positive and two planted negative cases, an aggregate pass/fail build_result, a body-free result_card, body-free validation/acceptance receipts via microcosm_core.receipts, and CLI dispatch. _evaluate_case calls the REAL capsule evaluate_case (no re-implementation, no baked answers) and decides observed_ok from expectation_met plus, for negatives, the presence of the expected recomputed failure marker.

Public-safe, source-faithful refactor of system/lib/navigation_fitness.py. Given route-packet fixtures, it recomputes per-task recall and precision of selected artifacts against expected stable ids (with prefix-glob matching), checks the first-contact command against a forbidden-first-route list, scores scent-term coverage, derives a latency verdict against a per-task budget, classifies a sufficiency status with a typed failure kind, and aggregates summary metrics (p50/p95 wall, pass/fail counts) plus sufficiency and latency debt candidates. evaluate_case also re-derives the benchmark and reports whether the recomputation matches a case's planted expectation.
required_anchors: Curated route-packet benchmark evaluator for expected stable ids
forbidden_hits = [route for route in task.forbidden_first_routes if route and route in first_contact_command]
